name: Vantage Drilling International
summary: Vantage Drilling International provides offshore contract drilling services for national and independent oil and natural gas companies in the Cayman Islands, India, Qatar, Indonesia, Lebanon, Congo, Egypt, South Africa, and internationally. It also provides construction supervision services for drilling units for rigs that are under construction; preservation management services for rigs that are stacked; and operations and marketing services for operating rigs. As of March 18, 2021, it had a fleet of two ultra-deepwater drillships; and five premium jackup drilling rigs. The company was formerly known as Offshore Group Investment Limited and changed its name to Vantage Drilling International in February 2016. Vantage Drilling International was founded in 2007 and is based in Houston, Texas.
